justification: The issue title and body discuss the need for a tool to detect AI-generated content in PRs, which is related to CI processes. However, without clear instructions on what action needs to be taken or specific code areas affected, the classification remains uncertain.
current_state_summary: The issue discusses the need for an AI detection tool in CI processes but lacks clear action items. Related issues are open and not directly addressing the same topic.

related_issues.title: Discuss the issue of Numpy CI testing for LSX instructions
